issue_text:
Fix the parsing precedence of `not` operator
### Describe the bug

`not` currently has lower precedence than other boolean operators. It should be higher

### How to reproduce

```
> (not false) and false
false
> not false and false
true
> not (false and false)
true
```

### Expected behavior

```
> not false and false
false
```

### Screenshots

_No response_

### Configuration

0.89.0 (Nushell temporarily not available)

### Additional context

_No response_
issue_title: Fix the parsing precedence of `not` operator
